title: Wormhole Book
description: Mod that adds an uncraftable guidebook for Wormhole.
body:
Mod that adds an uncraftable guidebook for wormhole.

It's literally just a guidebook for wormhole so the mod is easier to setup and understand what each item does without needing Google.

Obviously requires [Wormhole](https://modrinth.com/mod/wormhole) and [Patchouli](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/patchouli).
